text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the start of the new year comes seasonal
sales. I'm doing some shopping when I notice
Tokai Teio searching the crowd for something.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh?! No way! She's gone! Wh-what do I do...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter, Teio? I didn't expect to see
your panicked face first thing in the new year.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Preeeez! You've gotta help me!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You got separated from Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi in
the crowd? Well... She's quite capable of finding
her way back to you. Don't you think you're
worrying a little too much?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But Prez! You don't know what happened to Tsuru
this morning when we visited the shrine!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Eurgh... I feel dizzy...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, that's because you bowed so hard I thought
you were going to hit your head on the ground!
And you kept doing it! Come on, let's sit down for
a bit!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Given what you've told me... I can see why you'd
be concerned.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
How was Tsuyoshi before you became separated?
Perhaps the answer lies there.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
How was she? Well, she was really excited... like
she was trying to hold back the urge to dash.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Huh. "Holding back the urge to dash..." Then
perhaps...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah! I think I might know where she is too!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
What about these shoes? No... This pair here is a
little pricier, but they look like the ones President
Rudolf wears, so...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: There you are!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Teio! Hey, take a look at those shoes! What
do you think?!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
They're kiiiind of expensive, but they look a lot
like the ones President Rudolf wears—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I imagine they would. After all, they're the exact
same shoes. They're very comfortable, and you
can feel the craftsmanship that went into making
them.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
...Hwuh?! Am I hallucinating? Wh-wh-why is
President Rudolf showing up in my first dream of
the year?!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry! I didn't realize we got separated! I
thought you were right behind me the whole
time...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You need to pay more attention to what's going
on around you! And hold onto my hand when we
move through crowds together!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I really am sorry! I'm totally ready to take your
hand whenever you want to go!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
...Huh? Wait. You said we got separated at the
mall entrance. So how did you know I was here?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It was a simple matter of deduction. I narrowed
my search based on what stores would fulfill your
desire to run, and this was the obvious choice.
How did you figure it out, Teio?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well... It was just after we finished our shrine visit!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And that is that for our shrine visit! Hey, Tsuru,
what did you pray for?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on! Like you don't already know the
answer to that!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. So, you're on the same wavelength. You're
both passionate about the same thing, so it
stands to reason you'd come to the same
conclusion.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: ...Waaaugh!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! What's wrong? Did your legs fall asleep or
something?!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
No! But my heart feels warm and fluffy! Like...
we're bound by the thread of our common dream!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Just so you know, though, I won't give up
first place, even if we're in the same race!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Of course! I expect nothing less!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing their bonds of friendship first thing in the
new year, I burn with newfound resolve to do my
best in the upcoming twelve months.
